title: Welcome to Influzer Insights
excerpt: Why I am starting this blog and what you can expect: practical leadership lessons, AI execution frameworks, and product strategy from real operating experience.
coverImageAlt: Notebook and laptop on a desk
contentHtml:
I built this Insights section to share practical lessons from operating across global product and technology organizations.

You will find concrete frameworks for:

  • Scaling leadership teams without losing execution speed
  • Using AI in ways that drive real business outcomes
  • Aligning product, engineering, and go-to-market priorities

Why this matters now

Most content about AI and leadership is either too high-level or too tactical. My goal is to bridge those two levels so you can make better decisions faster.

What comes next

Over the next weeks, I will publish focused playbooks from real situations: growth phases, organizational transitions, and strategic bets that worked (and some that did not).
